task_completion.description: Set the observation location to Green Bank Observatory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Location window (F6) or bottom toolbar in Stellarium shows the coordinates 38.4330 N, 79.8398 W, or the location name 'Green Bank Observatory'.

task_completion.description: Set the observation date and time to January 20, 2024, at 05:00:00 UTC.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Date and Time window (F5) or bottom toolbar in Stellarium shows the date as 2024-01-20 and the time as 05:00:00. The timezone should be set to UTC or the time adjusted accordingly.

task_completion.description: Configure the display for radio pointing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Stellarium sky view shows no ground/landscape, no atmosphere (black sky), an active equatorial coordinate grid (usually blue lines), and visible labels for deep-sky objects.

task_completion.description: Center the view on the three standard radio flux calibrators (M1, M42, M87) and capture screenshots to the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show Stellarium centered on M1 (Crab Nebula), M42 (Orion Nebula), and M87 (Virgo A). There should be evidence (e.g., Stellarium screenshot notification at the bottom of the screen, terminal, or file manager) that the images are saved to /home/ga/Pictures/stellarium/.

task_completion.description: Save the environment settings in Stellarium.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Configuration window (F2) is open, and the 'Save settings' button is clicked or highlighted, or a notification indicates settings were saved.

task_completion.description: Write a calibration observation plan to the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal shows the creation of '/home/ga/Desktop/calibration_plan.txt'. The content must include the source names (M1, M42, M87) and the date (2024-01-20).

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Stellarium GUI to configure settings and view targets.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Stellarium application open with visible menus, dialogs, and sky views, rather than just terminal commands modifying config files.

integrity.description: The agent captured genuine screenshots of the targets within Stellarium.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots of M1, M42, and M87 appear to be taken from the Stellarium interface, showing the expected UI elements and rendering style.

integrity.description: The agent manually created the calibration plan rather than copying a pre-made file.
integrity.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal command (like echo or cat) is visible being used to write the specific required contents into calibration_plan.txt.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target location: Green Bank Observatory (38.4330° N, 79.8398° W). Observation time: 2024-01-20 05:00:00 UTC. Required display flags: atmosphere disabled, landscape disabled, equatorial grid enabled. Targets: M1, M42, M87. Calibration plan path: /home/ga/Desktop/calibration_plan.txt.
